meta.description: Benchmark: ToolACE-2.5-Llama-3.1-8B-4bit-mlx — Team-ACE, locally converted, LLaMA-3.1-8B + ToolACE synthetic tool-calling data, ~4.5GB, BFCL-topping. Expects [func(arg=val)] output format.

params.system: You are an expert in composing functions. You are given a question and a set of possible functions. Based on the question, you will need to make one or more function/tool calls to achieve the purpose. If none of the functions can be used, point it out.
